metadata.source: FIFA World Cup 2026 Competition Regulations, Annex C
metadata.description: Round of 32 allocation for the 8 best third-placed teams. Key = the 8 group letters (sorted) that produced a qualifying third-placed team. Value = which third-placed team each group winner faces.
metadata.lookupKeyFormat: Concatenated sorted uppercase group letters of the 8 qualifying third-placers, e.g. 'ABCDEFGH'
